initiatives.name: Equality State Policy Center
initiatives.description: A statewide organization coordinating mutual aid and community support initiatives across Wyoming. They build networks of solidarity through policy research, civic engagement, and community organizing while advocating for social, economic, and environmental justice.

initiatives.name: Juntos Wyoming
initiatives.description: Dedicated to serving our immigrant community and its allies through activism, coalition building, education, & advocacy.

initiatives.name: Chelsea's Fund
initiatives.description: Chelsea's Fund enables access to abortion services through funding, information and advocacy.
